sn27.5:1.2: “Monks, any desire-passion with regard to feeling born of contact at the eye is a defilement of the mind.
sn27.5:1.3: Any desire-passion with regard to feeling born of contact at the ear…
sn27.5:1.4: feeling born of contact at the nose…
sn27.5:1.5: feeling born of contact at the tongue…
sn27.5:1.6: feeling born of contact at the body…
sn27.5:1.7: feeling born of contact at the intellect is a defilement of the mind.
sn27.5:1.8: When, with regard to these six bases, the defilements of awareness are abandoned, then the mind is inclined to renunciation.
sn27.5:1.9: The mind fostered by renunciation feels malleable for the direct knowing of those qualities worth realizing.”
